overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Assassin's Creed Origins) showing a character traversing the ancient city of Alexandria at night. The character runs across temple rooftops overlooking the Pharos lighthouse, descends a monumental staircase flanked by statues, and walks through torch-lit streets with pedestrians and horses.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple rooftop with panoramic view of ancient city

agents.ego_description: running across the stone rooftop overlooking the ancient city and the distant lighthouse

tall ancient lighthouse with bright beacon at the top
large metal bowls with bright orange flames
dense cluster of stone buildings with terracotta roofs stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character runs across a high stone rooftop at night, with the Pharos lighthouse visible in the distance. The camera follows from behind as the character moves past burning braziers and columns, overlooking the sprawling ancient city of Alexandria below.

events.description: character moves from rooftop to descending the grand staircase
character begins descending the wide stairs between two monumental statues

agents.ego_description: running down the wide stone staircase flanked by monumental statues on tall columns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian visible walking at the bottom of the stairs

entered.detail: wide marble staircase descending between two large structures
tall green column topped with a classical statue
tall green column topped with a classical statue matching the left

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the rooftop to a grand monumental staircase flanked by two massive columns topped with statues. The camera follows the descent down the wide stone stairs, with the ancient city visible below and the lighthouse now appearing to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient city street with passing horses

events.description: character reaches bottom of stairs and enters street level
group of horses gallops past the character on the street

pedestrian in green tunic walking along the street

tall palm trees lining the street
two-story stone buildings with balconies and terracotta roofs
two-story stone buildings with lit windows and wooden awnings

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the bottom of the stairs and enters a cobblestone street lined with ancient residential buildings. Horses gallop past as the character walks forward, passing palm trees and buildings with warm torchlight glowing from windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient commercial street with lit shopfronts

agents.ego_description: walking down the torch-lit street observing the ancient architecture and distant temple

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the misty street

entered.detail: grand building with tall white columns and ornate roof
storefronts with warm lantern light and awnings

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the ancient city streets, passing columned buildings and shops with warm lantern light. The street stretches ahead toward a distant temple, with scattered pedestrians visible in the misty night air.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from the high rooftops of ancient Alexandria down into its torch-lit nocturnal streets. It begins with the character running across a stone rooftop past burning braziers, with the Pharos lighthouse looming in the distance over the sprawling city. As the character reaches the edge, the camera follows a transition down a grand monumental staircase flanked by massive columns and statues, shifting the perspective of the lighthouse to the left. The scene then opens into a cobblestone street where the character walks past galloping horses and palm trees, while the lighting shifts to the warm glow of torches emanating from residential windows. Finally, the camera glides forward through the misty night air, passing columned shops and scattered pedestrians toward a distant temple.
